Top performing Reels
  1. EP 1: BABE ON A BUDGET TAKES THE FOOD SHOP! 🛒 Girlies, presenting to you, your £35 (!!) weekly food shop to include… 🍅 FIVE MAIN VEGGIE MEALS 🍴 LEFTOVERS TO COVER YOU FOR LUNCH 🍳 A BREAKFAST OPTION ❌ NO WASTE !! HEHE Although this technically serves 1 (as it’s literally how I eat lol) it could so easily cover 2 of you if you throw in a couple of extras. YOUR FOOD SHOP: - 125g Mozzarella Ball - 12x Eggs - 500g Basmati Rice - 200g Paneer - Red Onions (bag) - Bell Peppers (bag) - 2x Chopped Tomatoes (400g tin) - 120 Baby Leaf Spinach - 6/8 Veggie Sausages - 2 x Chickpeas (400g tin) - 500g Pasta - 6/8 Mini Wraps - 30g Flat Leaf Parsley - 250ml Sesame Oil - Bread (of choice) - Black Beans (400g tin) - 1.25kg Sweet Potatoes - Large Avocado - 100g Spring Onions - 300g Super Firm Tofu - Loose Broccoli - 1 Jar of Red Pesto - 225g Halloumi - 200g Soft Cheese - 300ml Sour Cream - 850g Frozen Peas - 400ml Coconut Milk - Chipotle Chilli Paste - Sweet Mango Chutney - 400g Mushrooms = £35.79 🤠🤠🤠 (I shopped online via Sainsbury’s, using offers at the time of purchase so this will vary!) I’ll be posting a recipe every day so please do follow along. I’m hoping to do one of these monthly so hopefully you’ll be able to build up a big bank of budget friendly veggie recipes !! 🩷 #veggierecipes #budgetfoodshop #weeklyfoodshop #vegetarian #foodshopping
    62.4k
  2. WEEK 5 | MEAL 3: BABE ON A BUDGET TAKES THE WEEKLY SHOP 🛒🛒🩷🩷 MEAL 3: MARRY ME BUTTERBEAN LASAGNE 🍴 3 portions* ⏰ 35 minutes Store cupboard essentials: oil, minced garlic, smoked paprika, mixed herbs, cayenne pepper, salt & pepper, veggie stock cube, lasagne sheets Ingredients - 1 red onion - 1tsp minced garlic - 70g sun-dried tomatoes - 1tbsp tomato purée - 400g butterbeans - 1tsp smoked paprika - 1tsp mixed herbs - 1tsp cayenne pepper - Salt & pepper - Veggie stock cube - 6-8 lasagne sheets - Handful spinach - 1-2tbsp creme fraiche - Handful fresh basil - Cheddar cheese - 1 garlic baguette To make... 🫘 Dice up your red onion & fry off in the oil from your sun-dried tomatoes and once softened, add minced garlic and continue to cook for 2 minutes. 🫘 Dice up your sun-dried tomato into teeny tiny chunks and add them into the mix along with your tomato puree. 🫘 Mix well before adding your drained butterbeans and seasoning with smoked paprika, mixed herbs, cayenne pepper & salt and pepper. Mix well. 🫘 Add 500-600ml of veggie stock and bring to a simmer before breaking in your lasagne sheets. 🫘 Make sure they’re covered - adding more stock if needs be. Bring to the boil, cover and simmer for 10-12 minutes, regularly separating the sheets with a fork. 🫘 Stir through spinach, creme fraiche and fresh basil before topping with a generous handful of cheddar cheese and popping under the grill for 5 minutes. 🫘 Serve up with garlic bread straight from the oven and enjoy! *BULKING OUT OR DOWN? This serves 3 but you can easily bulk up with more lasagne sheets! 🫙 Store in the fridge in an airtight container & reheat until piping hot. Also suitable for freezing. #babeonabudget #weeklyfoodshop #veggierecipes
    34.4k
  3. WEEK 5: BABE ON A BUDGET, TAKES THE WEEKLY SHOP! 🛒🩷 Girlies, presenting to you, your £35 (!!) weekly food shop to include… 🤠 FIVE MAIN VEGGIE MEALS 🍴 LEFTOVERS TO COVER YOU FOR LUNCH 🍳 A BREAKFAST OPTION ❌ NO WASTE !! HEHE Although this technically serves 1 (as it’s literally how I eat lol) it could so easily cover 2 of you if you throw in a couple of extras. Please do feel free to shop around, you may well get it cheaper! 🫰🏼 YOUR SHOPPING LIST: 1kg Greek Style Natural Yoghurt 150g Chia Seeds 150g Raspberries 100g Dark Chocolate 1 Cauliflower 3x Red Onions 200g Paneer Tikka Paste Pots 400ml Coconut Milk 400g Chickpeas 400g Chopped Tomatoes 250g Microwave Rice Mango Chutney 2kg White Potatoes 200g Extra Firm Tofu 56g Shawarma Seasoning Little Gem Lettuce Small Cucumber 100g Sun-dried Tomatoes Tomato Purée 400g Butter Beans 120g Baby Leaf Spinach 300ml Crème Fraiche Fresh Basil 220g Cheddar Cheese Garlic Baguette x2 2x Bell Pepper 250g Flat Top Mushrooms Avocado 300g Tomato & Mozzarella Tortellini 🤠 = £33.97 Spend your additional £1 on wraps if you cannot be arsed making your own! (I shopped online via Sainsbury’s, using offers at the time of purchase so this will vary!) STORE CUPBOARD INGREDIENTS: Oil, minced garlic, minced ginger, chilli flakes, dried parsley, plain flour, smoked paprika, onion powder, salt & pepper, mixed herbs, lemon juice, dried mint, cayenne pepper, veggie stock cube, lasagne sheets (lol), ground cumin, honey, BBQ sauce, dried parsley OPTIONAL: Hot sauce I’ll be posting a recipe every day so please do follow along. PS, there are 5 meals because it’s a lot of food so, you’ll easily be fed for 7 days if you want to be !! 🩷 #veggierecipes #budgetfoodshop #weeklyfoodshop
    23.9k

Top performing Reels
  1. Jam & Buttered Toast Cookies 🍓🍞🍪 Crispy toast edges, gooey white choc, ripples of raspberry jam 😮‍💨 the snapshot recipe is below & the full version is on my Substack. The inevitable evolution of the toast cookie. Arguably even more intriguing than the first one? Very after-school-snack vibes. I dive into this recipe with full detail & have a little chat about this past week going viral over on Substack. Ingredients ✨ 🍞 Toast flakes: • 3 slices sourdough, toasted - I used @jasonssourdough • ~1 tbsp salted butter • ~1 tbsp raspberry conserve (I bought the @marksandspencerfood one). Make sure it’s not too watery, you want a firm jam/conserve. 🍪 Cookie dough: • 50g cold unsalted butter + 80g brown butter • 1 tsp white miso • 165g white sugar + 60g dark brown/muscovado • 1 egg + 1 yolk • 1 tsp vanilla • 250g plain flour • ½ tsp bicarb, ¼ tsp baking powder, ¼ tsp salt • 240g white chocolate (save some for topping 🤍) • 120g raspberry conserve (for swirling 🍓) How 🌀 Toast, butter & jam the bread → blitz into flakes 🍞 Cold butter + Brown butter → mix with sugars + miso → add egg, yolk & vanilla Fold in dry → add white choc + 60g toast flakes Spoon jam over dough to marble (DON’T MIX ❗️) Scoop, coat in toast flakes, chill ❄️ Bake at 190°C for 9–11 mins 🔥 Top with extra white choc, cool slightly & enjoy 🤍
    119.5k
  2. Miso Buttered Toast Cookies 🍞🧈🍪 RECIPE BELOW & full version on my Substack - link in bio. — Yes, toast 🍞 in a cookie. Toast, arguably the greatest invention since (& because of) sliced bread? Sourdough toast to be precise. Buttered sourdough toast. And miso, can’t forget the miso. Oh and the flakey salt, let’s add that too, just because we can. RECIPE: Ingredients ✨ 🍞 Toast flakes: • 3 slices sourdough (toasted + buttered) • 1 tbsp salted butter 🍪 Cookie dough: • 50g cold unsalted butter + 80g brown butter • 1½ tsp white miso • 165g white sugar + 60g dark brown/muscovado • 1 egg + 1 yolk • 1 tsp vanilla • 1 tbsp black treacle • 250g plain flour • ½ tsp bicarb, ¼ tsp baking powder, 1/4 tsp salt • 280g blonde + white chocolate (save some for topping!) How 🌀 Brown butter → mix with sugars + miso → add egg, yolk, vanilla & treacle → fold in dry ingredients → add choc + 60g toast flakes 🍞 Roll into balls, coat in more toast flakes, chill ❄️ Bake at 190°C for 8–10 mins 🔥 Top with extra choc, cool slightly & DEVOUR 🤍
    64.7k
  3. Oh hi 👋🏾 I’m back. But now as an ex-Bakery owner turned corporate girlie turned full time content creator with a dash of recipe development, food writing & dessert supper clubs/pop-ups thrown into the mix. And maybe a new brand one day, but that’s still just a maybe. I want this space to be more than just a page throwing recipes at you, I really want to empower more and more people to want to work in, or be around, or just join the ride in this crazy world of food I’m in & hopefully learn something from me on the way. First recipe drops tomorrow and it’s a GOODUN’ Buckle up kids, it’s gonna be a fun one xoxox
    62k

Top performing Reels
  1. Happy 42nd birthday to our inspirational and beautiful daughter Deborah. You came into the world full of life and never stopped running - you lived your life to the full, taught many others how to live including your wonderful children and family. We will always wish you were still with us to share more magic moments, such as your 40th birthday - sadly your last one - but your incredible legacy means you will be remembered and loved by many people. We will always thank you for what you gave to us and so many others during your short life. You loved life and showed us all how even through dark times that there is joy to be found and memories to be made that will be with us forever. We will always love and miss you and will never forget your final words- find a life worth enjoying, take risks, love deeply, have no regrets and always always have rebellious hope. And finally check your poo- it could just save your life. Love you Deborah. Xx @bowelbabefund @cr_uk @bowelcanceruk @royalmarsden @sophieellisbextor @su2cuk #rebellioushope
    360.7k
  2. Happy birthday to our darling daughter. How we wish you were still with us but so proud of all you achieved and the legacy that you have left. You will forever live in our hearts.
    138k
  3. Today is the first anniversary of our eldest child Deborah’s death. Deborah came into the world full of energy and never stopped over the next 40 years. The past 12 months have not been easy but we remember with immense pride and love the amazing impact she had on so many lives and the incredible legacy she has left. We were young parents when Deborah was born and the first cuddles and touches with your firstborn are something you remember for ever and cannot be taken away from you - life with Debs was always interesting, fun, and manic but there was always a determination in her to help others achieve their full potential especially in her teaching career. When first diagnosed with Bowel Cancer it took us time to realise the seriousness of her diagnosis but we immediately knew she wanted to share her story with others to establish open communication about a subject that many considered a taboo - you will all agree she succeeded ! We followed and supported her work in the last 5 years of life but also remembered we were there as her ever loving parents and grandparents to her children. In what became very difficult times it was wonderful to see the immense love and support she received from her husband Sebastien and their children, her siblings Sarah & Ben together with the unwavering support of their families. During her final weeks at home the atmosphere was unique but most importantly loving - we all understood what the end would be, although I struggled to believe that Deborah was facing the end of her life that she loved so much, but there was a determination to enjoy every last minute and experiences we had together. Although I’m sure nobody expected that Prince William would join us for tea & champagne!! Deborah you always provided a challenge but it was your ability to put it in the right direction and communicate so brilliantly that made a difference. As your brother said on the eve of your funeral - from the beginning you taught me how to live - you had that effect on far more people than you ever knew and that is why you were so loved and are now so missed - Deborah we love you for ever. Xx @bowelbabefund @cr_uk @bowelcanceruk #rebellioushope
    117.6k

    8.2k
  2. Bottling this moment ❤️ THANK YOU ❤️ the comments & messages have had me and my mum in TEARS this evening! I aim to get back to you all- I love you all so much and can’t thank you enough for your support- the best is yet to come… #headofyes ✈️ @virginred @virgin #grateful #thebestcommunity #wedidit
    6k
  3. Appreciate your mother, because you’ll never get another 🫶🏻 Honestly, moments like this are ones I’ll cherish forever. I managed a Blow Dry Bar for five years before travelling, and before that worked in salons for years — and blow drying hair was always my favourite thing to do. I think I know why now. I grew up fascinated watching my mum put her rollers in or try the latest hair tool. She was forever changing her hairstyle, and I’d be so excited waiting for her to come home from the salon. A personal highlight was the glue-in extensions… they lasted two weeks 🤣 When I was training, my boss let me blow dry my mum’s hair in the salon every week for £5 — I loved it. It’s also where I was taught: you can always take volume out, but you can’t add it back in… hence the rollers today 🫶🏻 I haven’t blow dried hair in ages, but over Christmas my feed was full of girls getting their hair done and it made me desperate to get a dryer and brush back in my hand. So when my mum asked me today, I jumped at the chance. I realised how much I’ve missed our little chats while I do her hair — even though we speak 24/7. I know how fortunate I am to have moments like this, and I’m sending so much love to anyone who doesn’t have this luxury ❤️ Thoroughly enjoyed Chris’s Salon this morning… even with limited tools (a few rollers and NO section clips 💀). Little moments. Big love. Forever grateful 🤍🫶🏻
    5.2k

male

Start a Free Trial to Unlock
Top performing Reels
  1. Day 2 of my solo Cornwall van trip and all my loose plans went out the window!! I had originally thought I’d head to jubilee pool for half a day and to the rock pool at Mousehole. I’d say I was half put off my the narrow roads getting down there, but also something in my head was telling me I’m exactly where I should be today! So I stayed at Sennen Beach. The surf lesson with @sennensurfcentre was really good! I’ve had a lesson in the past with a different surf centre, but the instructors here I found to be so much better! I’m definitely no expert and I’m in need of maybe 100 more lessons 😂 but I managed to stand up for the first time, so that’s a win for me After spending the day here, I was in the hunt for somewhere to park up for day 3! Day three is the reason I came to Cornwall for the August bank holiday, and I really struggled to find a place to stay for the night. Stay tuned! My paddleboard is from @adventurewithwave and there’s a 10% discount code in my bio 🤍 And I also have a 10% cadac code so if anyone needs that comment below! - - - - - - - - #transitcamper #vanlifeuk #ontheroad #explorebritain #vangirls #vandiary #ratcamper #vantrip #cornwalllife #cornwallholiday #surfislife #surfcamp #solovanlife #parttimenomad #nomadgirls #watersports #sennen #beachbums #surfsup🏄
    25k
  2. 1 sleep until the big man 🧑‍🎄 Happy Christmas Eve! - - - - #santahat #waterfallshoot #thelakedistrict #lakedistrictuk #ukwinter #christmascollection #exploretheoutdoors #vantravel
    16k
  3. New milestone unlocked! Thank you to everyone for following along on my adventures 🚐 I’ve never properly introduced myself, but outside of travelling across the country I have a normal office job. So basically I sit on my fat arse all day. Getting away when the clock strikes on Friday, is my escape. And I’m no stranger to a long drive, I’d say on average I’m away 3 out of 4 weekends a month. I’ve no idea how much fuel money I spent In 2025, but every penny was well worth it. So let’s see where the next year takes us, and I’ll be documenting my travels along the way 🚐 Happy camping guys ✌🏾 - - - - - - #vantravel #vanlifeuk #vangirls #vandiary #diyvanbuild #diycamper #ukescape #ukcampsites #happyoutside #memyself #solofemaletravel #soloadventures
    4.6k

You need to add this Aussie brunch spot to your list of places to go in London!! 🐚 Serving up a refreshed breakfast menu in their dreamy interiors (it’s giving beach vibes), we ordered: 🥑 sweet potato & zucchini fritters with smoked salmon, poached eggs, dill yog (yum) & we added avo 🍳 chilli scrambled eggs with stracciatella 🍓 homemade granola with yoghurt 🥞 ricotta hotcakes with honeycomb butter & maple syrup @milkbeachlondon have locations in Soho & Queen’s Park so run don’t waaalk ✨ Invite #brunchlondon #londonbrunch #brunchfood #londoneat #londoneats #wheretoeatlondon #londondining #londonfoodguide #londonfoodscene #londonforyou #travellondon #topcitybites #brunchgoals #brunchideas #brunchlover #foodaholic #aestheticedits #timeoutlondon #visitlondon #mysecretlondon #foodstagram #fooodieee #londonlunch #tastelondon #foodgoals #foodbeast #brunching #yummyfoods

SAVE this brunch spot for an unreaaal foodie spread… 👀 The banana bread with espresso butter is a must have, as well as the loaded bagel & the young betty with salmon & hollandaise *serious droool* 🤤 Paired with a fresh smoothie for the ultimate brunch set up ✨ 📍 @julietsqualityfood #brunchlondon #londonbrunch #brunchfood #brunchgoals #brunchtime #brunchoclock #londoneats #wheretoeatlondon #londonsbest #londoneats #eatlondon #eaaats #foodtime #fooodieee #foodguide #londonfoodguide #londonfoodscene #londonfood #brunchspot #brunchspots #londonfoodspots #hiddengems #londonhiddengems #timeoutlondon #brunchspread #fooodstagram #foodmania #foodnation #foodaholics
    149.2k
